label: Tale
description: Defines an event recorded by the tale recorder and used for history, memories, art generation, and generated text.

type.label: Type
type.description: Lifetime and history behavior of this tale. Volatile tales are discarded when unused; Expirable tales age out after expireDays; PermanentHistorical tales persist indefinitely.

taleClass.label: Tale class
taleClass.description: C# Tale subclass used to record data when this tale fires. Common values: Tale, Tale_SinglePawn, Tale_DoublePawn, Tale_SinglePawnAndDef, Tale_DoublePawnAndDef, Tale_SinglePawnAndThing, Tale_DoublePawnKilledBy. Modders can add custom subclasses.

usableForArt.label: Usable for art
usableForArt.description: Whether this tale can be selected as the subject for art descriptions and inspiration text. Should pair with a positive baseInterest.

colonistOnly.label: Colonist only
colonistOnly.description: Whether recording is restricted to colonist-related events. If true, the tale is not recorded for non-colonist pawns.

usableWithChildren.label: Usable with children
usableWithChildren.description: Whether child pawns can participate in this tale.

maxPerPawn.label: Max per pawn
maxPerPawn.description: Maximum number of this tale that can be recorded for one pawn. -1 means unlimited.

ignoreChance.label: Ignore chance
ignoreChance.description: Probability (0–1) that the tale is silently skipped when the triggering event fires.

expireDays.label: Expire days
expireDays.description: Age in in-game days before an Expirable tale is discarded if unused. -1 means no expiry. Non-Expirable types should leave this at -1.

rulePack.label: Rule pack
rulePack.description: Grammar rules used when this tale is referenced in generated text, art descriptions, or battle logs.

firstPawnSymbol.label: First pawn symbol
firstPawnSymbol.description: Grammar variable prefix for the first pawn in double-pawn tale classes (e.g. Tale_DoublePawn). The source warns if this is missing or set to the default string 'pawn'.

secondPawnSymbol.label: Second pawn symbol
secondPawnSymbol.description: Grammar variable prefix for the second pawn in double-pawn tale classes (e.g. Tale_DoublePawn). The source warns if this is missing or set to the default string 'pawn'.

defSymbol.label: Def symbol
defSymbol.description: Grammar variable prefix for the Def payload in AndDef tale classes (e.g. Tale_SinglePawnAndDef, Tale_DoublePawnAndDef).

defType.label: Def type
defType.description: Def class used to generate test data and interpret the Def payload in AndDef tale classes. This is a type name (e.g. ThingDef, SkillDef), not a specific Def instance. Defaults to ThingDef.

baseInterest.label: Base interest
baseInterest.description: Contribution to art selection and tale interest scoring. Should pair with usableForArt = true when positive.

historyGraphColor.label: History graph color
historyGraphColor.description: Color used for this tale's entry in the history graph.

basic-tale.label: Basic tale
basic-tale.description: Minimal single-pawn tale with a rule pack for generated text.

art-tale.label: Art-eligible tale
art-tale.description: Tale configured for art and history graph display with interest scoring.
